name: Indoor Low Table: Unique Importance
description: A low table with ample storage space that is commonly used in Lightkeeper camps.\nAs a table with a rack, it often reflects the owner's interests — flower enthusiasts tend to adorn it with potted plants, book lovers pile books on it, and food aficionados will laden it with all kinds of delicacies. For the Ratniki, this is the piece of furniture that is closest to their beds, where they usually place the most important item to them, the thing they carry with them at all times: their lantern.
